patches.hypothesis: The refined method uses a more robust approach to handle edge cases and avoids hardcoding values. The method now passes all the original failing tests and handles general cases, not just test inputs.
patches.original_hypothesis: The test case is expecting an IllegalArgumentException to be thrown when the start and end values are the same, but the method is not throwing an exception in that case. Additionally, the method is not handling the case where the start value is greater than the end value.
